timeline_title: Timeline of the Strait of Hormuz

title: Achaemenid control of the Persian Gulf littoral
description: Achaemenid expansion brought much of the northern Gulf littoral under imperial control, establishing one of the earliest major states to influence passage through the strait.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Strait of Hormuz
timeline_description: Chronology of the Strait of Hormuz as a strategic maritime chokepoint linking the Persian Gulf to the Gulf of Oman and the wider Indian Ocean.
title: Islamic caliphates dominate Gulf routes
description: With the rise of Islamic rule across Arabia and Persia, maritime routes through the strait became integrated into expanding Indian Ocean trade networks.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Strait of Hormuz
timeline_description: Chronology of the Strait of Hormuz as a strategic maritime chokepoint linking the Persian Gulf to the Gulf of Oman and the wider Indian Ocean.
title: Hormuz emerges as a regional port power
description: The port polity associated with Hormuz grew in commercial importance as Gulf and Indian Ocean exchange intensified.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Strait of Hormuz
timeline_description: Chronology of the Strait of Hormuz as a strategic maritime chokepoint linking the Persian Gulf to the Gulf of Oman and the wider Indian Ocean.
title: Kingdom of Hormuz consolidates maritime influence
description: Hormuz developed into a prosperous entrepôt that profited from taxing and protecting commerce moving through the narrows.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Strait of Hormuz
timeline_description: Chronology of the Strait of Hormuz as a strategic maritime chokepoint linking the Persian Gulf to the Gulf of Oman and the wider Indian Ocean.
title: Portuguese seize Hormuz
description: Portuguese forces captured Hormuz, seeking to control commerce through one of the world's key sea passages.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Strait of Hormuz
timeline_description: Chronology of the Strait of Hormuz as a strategic maritime chokepoint linking the Persian Gulf to the Gulf of Oman and the wider Indian Ocean.
title: Portuguese fortification of Hormuz completed
description: Portugal strengthened its position by building durable fortifications and integrating Hormuz into its Estado da Índia system.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Strait of Hormuz
timeline_description: Chronology of the Strait of Hormuz as a strategic maritime chokepoint linking the Persian Gulf to the Gulf of Oman and the wider Indian Ocean.
title: Safavid-Persian and English forces expel Portugal
description: A joint Persian-English operation removed the Portuguese from Hormuz and shifted regional control of the strait.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Strait of Hormuz
timeline_description: Chronology of the Strait of Hormuz as a strategic maritime chokepoint linking the Persian Gulf to the Gulf of Oman and the wider Indian Ocean.
title: British treaty network expands in the Gulf
description: British strategic agreements in the Gulf laid foundations for later maritime security arrangements around the strait.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Strait of Hormuz
timeline_description: Chronology of the Strait of Hormuz as a strategic maritime chokepoint linking the Persian Gulf to the Gulf of Oman and the wider Indian Ocean.
title: British anti-piracy policing intensifies
description: Nineteenth-century British naval power increasingly shaped security and navigation in the Gulf approaches to the strait.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Strait of Hormuz
timeline_description: Chronology of the Strait of Hormuz as a strategic maritime chokepoint linking the Persian Gulf to the Gulf of Oman and the wider Indian Ocean.
title: Britain withdraws east of Suez
description: The end of Britain's longstanding military role in the Gulf altered the regional balance around the strait shortly before new Gulf states emerged.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Strait of Hormuz
timeline_description: Chronology of the Strait of Hormuz as a strategic maritime chokepoint linking the Persian Gulf to the Gulf of Oman and the wider Indian Ocean.
title: UAE is formed on the southern shore
description: The creation of the United Arab Emirates reshaped sovereignty on the southern side of the strait's wider approach.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Strait of Hormuz
timeline_description: Chronology of the Strait of Hormuz as a strategic maritime chokepoint linking the Persian Gulf to the Gulf of Oman and the wider Indian Ocean.
title: Iranian Revolution raises fears over navigation
description: The revolution in Iran heightened international concern over the future security of oil shipments through the strait.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Strait of Hormuz
timeline_description: Chronology of the Strait of Hormuz as a strategic maritime chokepoint linking the Persian Gulf to the Gulf of Oman and the wider Indian Ocean.
title: Iran-Iraq War begins
description: War between Iran and Iraq transformed the Gulf into a combat zone and increased risks to tanker traffic.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Strait of Hormuz
timeline_description: Chronology of the Strait of Hormuz as a strategic maritime chokepoint linking the Persian Gulf to the Gulf of Oman and the wider Indian Ocean.
title: Tanker War phase escalates
description: Attacks on commercial shipping during the Iran-Iraq War made the strait and surrounding Gulf a focal point of global energy security.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Strait of Hormuz
timeline_description: Chronology of the Strait of Hormuz as a strategic maritime chokepoint linking the Persian Gulf to the Gulf of Oman and the wider Indian Ocean.
title: U.S. reflagging and escort operations begin
description: The United States started escorting reflagged Kuwaiti tankers, marking a major outside naval role in Gulf shipping security.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Strait of Hormuz
timeline_description: Chronology of the Strait of Hormuz as a strategic maritime chokepoint linking the Persian Gulf to the Gulf of Oman and the wider Indian Ocean.
title: Operation Praying Mantis strikes Iranian forces
description: A major U.S.-Iran naval clash underscored how quickly crises around the strait could escalate.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Strait of Hormuz
timeline_description: Chronology of the Strait of Hormuz as a strategic maritime chokepoint linking the Persian Gulf to the Gulf of Oman and the wider Indian Ocean.
title: Iran renews closure threats
description: Amid sanctions pressure, Iranian officials revived threats to close the strait, pushing the chokepoint back into world headlines.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Strait of Hormuz
timeline_description: Chronology of the Strait of Hormuz as a strategic maritime chokepoint linking the Persian Gulf to the Gulf of Oman and the wider Indian Ocean.
title: Regional tanker security crisis intensifies
description: A series of attacks and seizures in and around the Gulf renewed fears over commercial passage through the strait.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Strait of Hormuz
timeline_description: Chronology of the Strait of Hormuz as a strategic maritime chokepoint linking the Persian Gulf to the Gulf of Oman and the wider Indian Ocean.
title: Energy chokepoint concerns remain central
description: Even without full closure, the strait continued to be treated as one of the world's most important oil and LNG chokepoints.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Strait of Hormuz
timeline_description: Chronology of the Strait of Hormuz as a strategic maritime chokepoint linking the Persian Gulf to the Gulf of Oman and the wider Indian Ocean.
title: Iran says it will not close the strait
description: During the 2026 regional war, Iran's UN envoy said Tehran would not close the strait even as conflict again disrupted shipping and energy markets.

timeline_description: Major global oil shocks, embargoes, supply disruptions, and policy turning points that reshaped energy markets.
title: Edwin Drake well launches modern oil era
description: Commercial oil production in Pennsylvania is widely treated as the starting point of the modern petroleum industry.

timeline_description: Major global oil shocks, embargoes, supply disruptions, and policy turning points that reshaped energy markets.
title: Spindletop transforms oil markets
description: The Spindletop gusher greatly expanded supply and accelerated the rise of oil as a strategic fuel.

timeline_description: Major global oil shocks, embargoes, supply disruptions, and policy turning points that reshaped energy markets.
title: Standard Oil is broken up
description: The breakup of Standard Oil restructured the world's most influential oil business network.

timeline_description: Major global oil shocks, embargoes, supply disruptions, and policy turning points that reshaped energy markets.
title: Postwar oil order begins to take shape
description: After World War II, oil became central to industrial reconstruction, transport, and military strategy.

timeline_description: Major global oil shocks, embargoes, supply disruptions, and policy turning points that reshaped energy markets.
title: Iranian oil nationalization sparks crisis
description: Iran's nationalization of the Anglo-Iranian Oil Company triggered a major international confrontation over oil control.

timeline_description: Major global oil shocks, embargoes, supply disruptions, and policy turning points that reshaped energy markets.
title: Suez Crisis disrupts oil shipments
description: The Suez Crisis interrupted tanker routes and highlighted Europe's vulnerability to Middle Eastern supply shocks.

timeline_description: Major global oil shocks, embargoes, supply disruptions, and policy turning points that reshaped energy markets.
title: OPEC is founded
description: Iran, Iraq, Kuwait, Saudi Arabia, and Venezuela created OPEC to coordinate petroleum policies.

timeline_description: Major global oil shocks, embargoes, supply disruptions, and policy turning points that reshaped energy markets.
title: Arab oil embargo begins
description: Arab producers cut exports after the Yom Kippur War, producing the first major postwar global oil shock.

timeline_description: Major global oil shocks, embargoes, supply disruptions, and policy turning points that reshaped energy markets.
title: IEA is established
description: Industrialized consumer states created the International Energy Agency in response to the 1973 oil crisis.

timeline_description: Major global oil shocks, embargoes, supply disruptions, and policy turning points that reshaped energy markets.
title: Iranian Revolution disrupts production
description: Political upheaval in Iran cut supply and intensified the late-1970s oil shock.

timeline_description: Major global oil shocks, embargoes, supply disruptions, and policy turning points that reshaped energy markets.
title: Second oil shock drives price surge
description: The Iranian Revolution and wider instability produced a second major global oil price spike.

timeline_description: Major global oil shocks, embargoes, supply disruptions, and policy turning points that reshaped energy markets.
title: Iran-Iraq War removes supply
description: War between two major producers deepened market instability in the early 1980s.

timeline_description: Major global oil shocks, embargoes, supply disruptions, and policy turning points that reshaped energy markets.
title: Oil price collapse follows oversupply
description: Saudi production policy and oversupply contributed to a sharp drop in prices.

timeline_description: Major global oil shocks, embargoes, supply disruptions, and policy turning points that reshaped energy markets.
title: Iraq invades Kuwait
description: The invasion took large volumes off the market and caused another major price shock.

timeline_description: Major global oil shocks, embargoes, supply disruptions, and policy turning points that reshaped energy markets.
title: Operation Desert Storm stabilizes supply outlook
description: The coalition campaign against Iraq helped begin the unwinding of the immediate 1990 oil shock.

timeline_description: Major global oil shocks, embargoes, supply disruptions, and policy turning points that reshaped energy markets.
title: Hurricanes Katrina and Rita hit U.S. output
description: Storm damage in the Gulf of Mexico caused one of the largest modern non-war oil supply disruptions.

timeline_description: Major global oil shocks, embargoes, supply disruptions, and policy turning points that reshaped energy markets.
title: Oil prices reach record highs
description: Brent and other benchmarks surged amid tight supply, speculation, and strong demand before the financial crash.

timeline_description: Major global oil shocks, embargoes, supply disruptions, and policy turning points that reshaped energy markets.
title: Pandemic demand collapse and price war crash markets
description: COVID-19 lockdowns and a Saudi-Russian price war drove an extraordinary collapse in oil demand and prices.

timeline_description: Major global oil shocks, embargoes, supply disruptions, and policy turning points that reshaped energy markets.
title: Russian invasion of Ukraine triggers energy shock
description: The war in Ukraine and sanctions on Russia shook global oil and gas markets.

timeline_description: Major global oil shocks, embargoes, supply disruptions, and policy turning points that reshaped energy markets.
title: Hormuz disruption becomes largest recorded oil shock
description: Reuters and the IEA described the 2026 Middle East disruption as the largest supply shock in oil-market history.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Iran-Israel conflict from the 1979 Iranian Revolution through direct military confrontation.
title: Iranian Revolution ends Iran-Israel alignment
description: The Islamic Revolution transformed Iran from a strategic partner of Israel under the shah into a declared adversary.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Iran-Israel conflict from the 1979 Iranian Revolution through direct military confrontation.
title: Israel-Iran ties are severed
description: The new Iranian state broke official ties with Israel and made anti-Zionism central to its foreign policy.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Iran-Israel conflict from the 1979 Iranian Revolution through direct military confrontation.
title: Iran backs Hezbollah after Lebanon war
description: Iran's support for Hezbollah created a major long-term front in its conflict with Israel.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Iran-Israel conflict from the 1979 Iranian Revolution through direct military confrontation.
title: Israeli embassy in Buenos Aires is bombed
description: The attack was widely linked by investigators to Iran and Hezbollah, deepening the conflict's global dimension.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Iran-Israel conflict from the 1979 Iranian Revolution through direct military confrontation.
title: AMIA Jewish center bombing shocks Argentina
description: The bombing intensified accusations against Iranian-linked networks and worsened Israel-Iran hostility.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Iran-Israel conflict from the 1979 Iranian Revolution through direct military confrontation.
title: Iran's nuclear program becomes a central dispute
description: Revelations about undeclared Iranian nuclear facilities moved the confrontation into a new strategic phase.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Iran-Israel conflict from the 1979 Iranian Revolution through direct military confrontation.
title: Israel and Hezbollah fight a major war
description: The Lebanon war highlighted Iran's indirect military pressure on Israel through allied armed groups.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Iran-Israel conflict from the 1979 Iranian Revolution through direct military confrontation.
title: Stuxnet sabotages Iranian nuclear systems
description: The cyberattack on Iran's nuclear program marked a new front in the shadow war.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Iran-Israel conflict from the 1979 Iranian Revolution through direct military confrontation.
title: Syrian civil war opens a new arena
description: Iranian and Israeli operations increasingly intersected in Syria as the war expanded.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Iran-Israel conflict from the 1979 Iranian Revolution through direct military confrontation.
title: Israel expands strikes on Iranian-linked targets in Syria
description: Israeli attacks on weapons transfers and allied positions in Syria became a recurring feature of the conflict.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Iran-Israel conflict from the 1979 Iranian Revolution through direct military confrontation.
title: Iran nuclear deal is signed
description: The JCPOA temporarily changed the diplomatic context of the conflict even as Israeli leaders opposed the agreement.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Iran-Israel conflict from the 1979 Iranian Revolution through direct military confrontation.
title: United States leaves the JCPOA
description: Washington's withdrawal increased regional tension and aligned more closely with Israeli pressure on Iran.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Iran-Israel conflict from the 1979 Iranian Revolution through direct military confrontation.
title: Israel strikes Iranian targets after rocket fire
description: Direct exchanges between Israeli forces and Iranian-linked units in Syria escalated sharply.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Iran-Israel conflict from the 1979 Iranian Revolution through direct military confrontation.
title: Qassem Soleimani is killed
description: The U.S. killing of Iran's top commander intensified a regional security environment closely tied to Iran-Israel rivalry.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Iran-Israel conflict from the 1979 Iranian Revolution through direct military confrontation.
title: Mohsen Fakhrizadeh is assassinated
description: Iran blamed Israel for the killing of the scientist associated with its nuclear program.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Iran-Israel conflict from the 1979 Iranian Revolution through direct military confrontation.
title: Gaza war raises regional risks
description: The Israel-Hamas war increased the likelihood of a broader confrontation involving Iran-backed groups.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Iran-Israel conflict from the 1979 Iranian Revolution through direct military confrontation.
title: Israeli strike hits Iranian diplomatic compound in Damascus
description: The strike killed senior Revolutionary Guards officers and pushed the shadow conflict toward overt interstate confrontation.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Iran-Israel conflict from the 1979 Iranian Revolution through direct military confrontation.
title: Iran launches direct attack on Israel
description: Iran fired drones and missiles at Israel in an unprecedented direct strike from Iranian territory.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Iran-Israel conflict from the 1979 Iranian Revolution through direct military confrontation.
title: Israel and Iran exchange direct strikes again
description: Further missile exchanges demonstrated that direct state-to-state conflict had become more frequent.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the Iran-Israel conflict from the 1979 Iranian Revolution through direct military confrontation.
title: Open war begins in the 2026 regional conflict
description: Reuters reported that the new Iran war began on February 28, 2026, marking the sharpest escalation yet.

timeline_description: Key technological and strategic milestones in the development of ballistic missiles from early rocketry to modern nuclear arsenals.
title: Tsiolkovsky publishes foundational rocketry theory
description: Konstantin Tsiolkovsky's work provided a theoretical basis for modern rocketry that later enabled missile development.

timeline_description: Key technological and strategic milestones in the development of ballistic missiles from early rocketry to modern nuclear arsenals.
title: Goddard launches liquid-fueled rocket
description: Robert Goddard's successful launch was a key practical milestone in long-range rocket engineering.

timeline_description: Key technological and strategic milestones in the development of ballistic missiles from early rocketry to modern nuclear arsenals.
title: German Army begins formal rocket program
description: Germany institutionalized military rocketry, laying groundwork for the first modern ballistic missiles.

timeline_description: Key technological and strategic milestones in the development of ballistic missiles from early rocketry to modern nuclear arsenals.
title: V-2 achieves successful test flight
description: Germany's A-4/V-2 became the first long-range guided ballistic missile to fly successfully.

timeline_description: Key technological and strategic milestones in the development of ballistic missiles from early rocketry to modern nuclear arsenals.
title: V-2 combat use begins
description: Germany began using the V-2 against Allied cities, inaugurating the ballistic missile era in warfare.

timeline_description: Key technological and strategic milestones in the development of ballistic missiles from early rocketry to modern nuclear arsenals.
title: U.S. and USSR capture German missile technology
description: Postwar transfer of scientists and hardware accelerated superpower missile programs.

timeline_description: Key technological and strategic milestones in the development of ballistic missiles from early rocketry to modern nuclear arsenals.
title: Soviet R-1 enters service
description: The Soviet Union fielded an early postwar missile based on V-2 technology.

timeline_description: Key technological and strategic milestones in the development of ballistic missiles from early rocketry to modern nuclear arsenals.
title: Soviets test thermonuclear device
description: Advances in nuclear warheads increased the strategic value of long-range ballistic missiles.

timeline_description: Key technological and strategic milestones in the development of ballistic missiles from early rocketry to modern nuclear arsenals.
title: Soviet Union tests R-7 ICBM
description: The R-7 became the first successful intercontinental ballistic missile.

timeline_description: Key technological and strategic milestones in the development of ballistic missiles from early rocketry to modern nuclear arsenals.
title: First Soviet ICBMs are deployed
description: Britannica identifies 1958 as the start of operational Soviet ICBM deployment.

timeline_description: Key technological and strategic milestones in the development of ballistic missiles from early rocketry to modern nuclear arsenals.
title: United States deploys Atlas ICBM
description: The United States followed the Soviet Union with its own deployed ICBM force.

timeline_description: Key technological and strategic milestones in the development of ballistic missiles from early rocketry to modern nuclear arsenals.
title: Polaris SLBM enters service
description: Submarine-launched ballistic missiles created a survivable second-strike capability.

timeline_description: Key technological and strategic milestones in the development of ballistic missiles from early rocketry to modern nuclear arsenals.
title: Cuban Missile Crisis underscores missile danger
description: The crisis made ballistic missiles the central symbol of nuclear brinkmanship.

timeline_description: Key technological and strategic milestones in the development of ballistic missiles from early rocketry to modern nuclear arsenals.
title: SALT I negotiations focus on missile arsenals
description: Arms control efforts increasingly concentrated on limiting strategic ballistic missiles.

timeline_description: Key technological and strategic milestones in the development of ballistic missiles from early rocketry to modern nuclear arsenals.
title: China fields DF-5 program trajectory
description: China's strategic missile force moved toward true intercontinental range capability.

timeline_description: Key technological and strategic milestones in the development of ballistic missiles from early rocketry to modern nuclear arsenals.
title: Strategic Defense Initiative announced
description: The U.S. missile defense initiative highlighted the centrality of ballistic missile threats in late Cold War strategy.

timeline_description: Key technological and strategic milestones in the development of ballistic missiles from early rocketry to modern nuclear arsenals.
title: Gulf War spotlights Scud missiles
description: Iraqi Scud attacks demonstrated the continuing military and political impact of ballistic missiles.

timeline_description: Key technological and strategic milestones in the development of ballistic missiles from early rocketry to modern nuclear arsenals.
title: India and Pakistan test nuclear-capable systems
description: South Asia's nuclearization elevated the strategic relevance of regional ballistic missiles.

timeline_description: Key technological and strategic milestones in the development of ballistic missiles from early rocketry to modern nuclear arsenals.
title: North Korea tests long-range missiles amid crisis
description: North Korean missile development became one of the central ballistic missile challenges of the twenty-first century.

timeline_description: Key technological and strategic milestones in the development of ballistic missiles from early rocketry to modern nuclear arsenals.
title: ICBMs remain core strategic systems
description: Britannica's 2026 coverage still identifies the United States, Russia, and China as the principal land-based ICBM powers.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and policy milestones in the development of hypersonic flight and hypersonic weapons.
title: Early high-speed aerodynamic research advances
description: Prewar aerodynamic research began to address heating and control challenges later central to hypersonic flight.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and policy milestones in the development of hypersonic flight and hypersonic weapons.
title: V-2 reaches hypersonic speeds in flight
description: The V-2 was not a modern hypersonic weapon in doctrine, but it demonstrated sustained flight in the hypersonic regime.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and policy milestones in the development of hypersonic flight and hypersonic weapons.
title: U.S. Bumper and related tests extend high-speed rocketry
description: Postwar test programs pushed toward the speed and thermal conditions relevant to hypersonic systems.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and policy milestones in the development of hypersonic flight and hypersonic weapons.
title: NACA expands extreme-speed flight research
description: American research institutions intensified work on aerodynamic heating and high-Mach flight.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and policy milestones in the development of hypersonic flight and hypersonic weapons.
title: X-15 program begins flight testing
description: The X-15 became a landmark platform for hypersonic flight research.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and policy milestones in the development of hypersonic flight and hypersonic weapons.
title: X-15 sets lasting speed record
description: William J. Knight flew the X-15 at Mach 6.7, a major milestone in crewed hypersonic flight.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and policy milestones in the development of hypersonic flight and hypersonic weapons.
title: Boost-glide concepts persist in strategic research
description: Cold War programs kept alive the idea of maneuvering high-speed strike systems.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and policy milestones in the development of hypersonic flight and hypersonic weapons.
title: Strategic Defense Initiative renews interest in advanced intercept and strike technologies
description: The SDI era encouraged renewed investment in very high-speed systems and counter-systems.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and policy milestones in the development of hypersonic flight and hypersonic weapons.
title: Post-Cold War prompt global strike ideas emerge
description: Conventional long-range precision strike concepts later fed directly into U.S. hypersonic work.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and policy milestones in the development of hypersonic flight and hypersonic weapons.
title: United States pursues conventional prompt global strike
description: CRS traces modern U.S. hypersonic efforts to the early 2000s prompt global strike program.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and policy milestones in the development of hypersonic flight and hypersonic weapons.
title: NASA X-43A reaches hypersonic speeds under scramjet power
description: The X-43A provided a major proof-of-concept for air-breathing hypersonic propulsion.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and policy milestones in the development of hypersonic flight and hypersonic weapons.
title: HTV-2 tests highlight extreme technical difficulty
description: U.S. boost-glide experiments showed the challenge of maintaining control and survivability at hypersonic speed.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and policy milestones in the development of hypersonic flight and hypersonic weapons.
title: China tests DF-ZF hypersonic glide vehicle
description: China's program demonstrated that hypersonic weapons development had become a major great-power competition area.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and policy milestones in the development of hypersonic flight and hypersonic weapons.
title: Russia announces Avangard system
description: Moscow publicly elevated hypersonic weapons as a strategic prestige and deterrence capability.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and policy milestones in the development of hypersonic flight and hypersonic weapons.
title: Russia deploys Avangard
description: Russia said it had placed Avangard into service, marking the first claimed deployment of a strategic hypersonic glide vehicle.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and policy milestones in the development of hypersonic flight and hypersonic weapons.
title: United States accelerates multiple Army, Navy, and Air Force programs
description: American hypersonic work shifted from research emphasis toward operational acquisition programs.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and policy milestones in the development of hypersonic flight and hypersonic weapons.
title: China's orbital-fractional test draws global attention
description: Reports of a Chinese test combining orbital and glide concepts intensified international concern.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and policy milestones in the development of hypersonic flight and hypersonic weapons.
title: Russia uses Kinzhal in combat claims
description: The reported use of Kinzhal in the Ukraine war brought hypersonic weapons into active conflict narratives.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and policy milestones in the development of hypersonic flight and hypersonic weapons.
title: Congressional scrutiny of U.S. hypersonic programs deepens
description: Cost, testing, industrial capacity, and defenses became central congressional issues.

timeline_description: Major scientific, military, and policy milestones in the development of hypersonic flight and hypersonic weapons.
title: CRS reports hypersonics as a major ongoing force-planning issue
description: By 2025, congressional reporting showed hypersonic weapons had become a durable strategic procurement priority.

timeline_title: Timeline of the South China Sea Disputes
timeline_description: Key milestones in the territorial and maritime disputes of the South China Sea.
title: Sino-French boundary convention influences later claims
description: Late nineteenth-century boundary arrangements were later cited in competing historical narratives about maritime claims.

timeline_title: Timeline of the South China Sea Disputes
timeline_description: Key milestones in the territorial and maritime disputes of the South China Sea.
title: France occupies several Spratly features
description: French moves in the Spratlys became part of the modern legal and historical record of competing claims.

timeline_title: Timeline of the South China Sea Disputes
timeline_description: Key milestones in the territorial and maritime disputes of the South China Sea.
title: ROC publishes eleven-dash line map
description: The Republic of China issued the map that later evolved into the PRC's nine-dash line claim.

timeline_title: Timeline of the South China Sea Disputes
timeline_description: Key milestones in the territorial and maritime disputes of the South China Sea.
title: San Francisco Peace Treaty leaves ambiguity
description: Japan renounced claims to island groups without clearly assigning sovereignty, leaving space for later disputes.

timeline_title: Timeline of the South China Sea Disputes
timeline_description: Key milestones in the territorial and maritime disputes of the South China Sea.
title: Philippine and Taiwanese claim activity increases
description: Postwar rival claims over islands and reefs intensified across multiple governments.

timeline_title: Timeline of the South China Sea Disputes
timeline_description: Key milestones in the territorial and maritime disputes of the South China Sea.
title: China seizes the Paracel Islands from South Vietnam
description: The clash gave China full control of the Paracels and established a major precedent in the disputes.

timeline_title: Timeline of the South China Sea Disputes
timeline_description: Key milestones in the territorial and maritime disputes of the South China Sea.
title: Philippines formalizes Kalayaan Island Group claim
description: Manila institutionalized part of its Spratly claim through domestic legal measures.

timeline_title: Timeline of the South China Sea Disputes
timeline_description: Key milestones in the territorial and maritime disputes of the South China Sea.
title: UNCLOS is opened for signature
description: The modern law-of-the-sea framework became central to later legal arguments in the South China Sea.

timeline_title: Timeline of the South China Sea Disputes
timeline_description: Key milestones in the territorial and maritime disputes of the South China Sea.
title: Johnson South Reef clash kills Vietnamese sailors
description: A deadly China-Vietnam clash underscored the risks of armed confrontation over reefs.

timeline_title: Timeline of the South China Sea Disputes
timeline_description: Key milestones in the territorial and maritime disputes of the South China Sea.
title: China passes territorial sea law
description: Beijing codified claims in domestic law, widening concern among neighboring states.

timeline_title: Timeline of the South China Sea Disputes
timeline_description: Key milestones in the territorial and maritime disputes of the South China Sea.
title: Mischief Reef incident alarms the Philippines
description: Chinese structures on Mischief Reef became a major turning point in Manila-Beijing tensions.

timeline_title: Timeline of the South China Sea Disputes
timeline_description: Key milestones in the territorial and maritime disputes of the South China Sea.
title: ASEAN-China declaration on conduct is signed
description: The parties adopted a political framework intended to reduce tensions, though without binding enforcement.

timeline_title: Timeline of the South China Sea Disputes
timeline_description: Key milestones in the territorial and maritime disputes of the South China Sea.
title: China submits nine-dash line map to the UN
description: The submission internationalized the legal controversy over the scope of China's claims.

timeline_title: Timeline of the South China Sea Disputes
timeline_description: Key milestones in the territorial and maritime disputes of the South China Sea.
title: Scarborough Shoal standoff deepens rivalry
description: A prolonged China-Philippines confrontation at Scarborough Shoal intensified regional tensions.

timeline_title: Timeline of the South China Sea Disputes
timeline_description: Key milestones in the territorial and maritime disputes of the South China Sea.
title: Philippines files arbitration case
description: Manila challenged Chinese claims under UNCLOS, shifting the dispute into formal legal proceedings.

timeline_title: Timeline of the South China Sea Disputes
timeline_description: Key milestones in the territorial and maritime disputes of the South China Sea.
title: Large-scale Chinese land reclamation expands
description: China accelerated island-building and infrastructure construction on several disputed features.

timeline_title: Timeline of the South China Sea Disputes
timeline_description: Key milestones in the territorial and maritime disputes of the South China Sea.
title: Arbitral tribunal rules against expansive Chinese claims
description: The Hague tribunal found no legal basis for historic-rights claims within the nine-dash line as presented.

timeline_title: Timeline of the South China Sea Disputes
timeline_description: Key milestones in the territorial and maritime disputes of the South China Sea.
title: Marcos Jr. rejects Duterte-era conciliatory approach
description: The Philippines shifted toward a firmer posture over the West Philippine Sea.

timeline_title: Timeline of the South China Sea Disputes
timeline_description: Key milestones in the territorial and maritime disputes of the South China Sea.
title: Second Thomas Shoal confrontations intensify
description: Ship collisions, water-cannon incidents, and resupply standoffs made the shoal a central flashpoint.

timeline_title: Timeline of the South China Sea Disputes
timeline_description: Key milestones in the territorial and maritime disputes of the South China Sea.
title: Disputes remain unresolved amid heavier security competition
description: By 2025 the South China Sea remained one of Asia's most consequential maritime flashpoints.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Red Sea Shipping Crisis
timeline_description: Chronology of the Red Sea shipping crisis driven by Houthi attacks, military responses, and trade rerouting.
title: Gaza war triggers regional escalation
description: The Israel-Hamas war created the political and military context for attacks on shipping linked to the Red Sea crisis.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Red Sea Shipping Crisis
timeline_description: Chronology of the Red Sea shipping crisis driven by Houthi attacks, military responses, and trade rerouting.
title: Houthis begin attacking commercial vessels
description: Yemen's Houthis started targeting ships they said were linked to Israel, opening a new maritime front.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Red Sea Shipping Crisis
timeline_description: Chronology of the Red Sea shipping crisis driven by Houthi attacks, military responses, and trade rerouting.
title: Car carrier Galaxy Leader is seized
description: The seizure signaled that commercial transit in the southern Red Sea had become a direct conflict zone.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Red Sea Shipping Crisis
timeline_description: Chronology of the Red Sea shipping crisis driven by Houthi attacks, military responses, and trade rerouting.
title: Major lines suspend some Red Sea transits
description: Global carriers began diverting vessels around the Cape of Good Hope to reduce risk.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Red Sea Shipping Crisis
timeline_description: Chronology of the Red Sea shipping crisis driven by Houthi attacks, military responses, and trade rerouting.
title: Operation Prosperity Guardian is announced
description: The United States and partners organized a naval security effort to protect merchant shipping.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Red Sea Shipping Crisis
timeline_description: Chronology of the Red Sea shipping crisis driven by Houthi attacks, military responses, and trade rerouting.
title: U.S. and U.K. strike Houthi targets
description: Direct military action in Yemen broadened the crisis beyond ship defense.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Red Sea Shipping Crisis
timeline_description: Chronology of the Red Sea shipping crisis driven by Houthi attacks, military responses, and trade rerouting.
title: Insurance and freight costs surge
description: War-risk premiums and longer voyages increased the economic cost of Red Sea disruption.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Red Sea Shipping Crisis
timeline_description: Chronology of the Red Sea shipping crisis driven by Houthi attacks, military responses, and trade rerouting.
title: Rubymar is hit and later sinks
description: The bulk carrier became one of the clearest symbols of the material damage caused by the crisis.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Red Sea Shipping Crisis
timeline_description: Chronology of the Red Sea shipping crisis driven by Houthi attacks, military responses, and trade rerouting.
title: EU launches Operation Aspides
description: The European Union opened its own maritime security mission to protect navigation.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Red Sea Shipping Crisis
timeline_description: Chronology of the Red Sea shipping crisis driven by Houthi attacks, military responses, and trade rerouting.
title: Bridge collapse risk spreads through supply chains
description: Longer Asia-Europe routes aggravated schedule instability, container shortages, and cost pressures.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Red Sea Shipping Crisis
timeline_description: Chronology of the Red Sea shipping crisis driven by Houthi attacks, military responses, and trade rerouting.
title: Attacks continue despite naval patrols
description: Persistent strikes showed that escort missions alone could not fully restore normal traffic.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Red Sea Shipping Crisis
timeline_description: Chronology of the Red Sea shipping crisis driven by Houthi attacks, military responses, and trade rerouting.
title: Container lines keep Cape rerouting in place
description: Carriers extended diversions rather than risk routine Suez-Red Sea passage.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Red Sea Shipping Crisis
timeline_description: Chronology of the Red Sea shipping crisis driven by Houthi attacks, military responses, and trade rerouting.
title: Crew safety becomes a central industry concern
description: Shipping companies and unions increasingly treated the corridor as a severe labor and safety risk.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Red Sea Shipping Crisis
timeline_description: Chronology of the Red Sea shipping crisis driven by Houthi attacks, military responses, and trade rerouting.
title: Maersk says crisis impact is intensifying
description: Reuters reported continued disruption and prolonged rerouting by one of the world's largest carriers.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Red Sea Shipping Crisis
timeline_description: Chronology of the Red Sea shipping crisis driven by Houthi attacks, military responses, and trade rerouting.
title: Crisis enters a prolonged phase
description: By late 2024, temporary disruption had hardened into a persistent restructuring of shipping schedules.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Red Sea Shipping Crisis
timeline_description: Chronology of the Red Sea shipping crisis driven by Houthi attacks, military responses, and trade rerouting.
title: Red Sea disruptions continue into a second calendar year
description: The persistence of attacks and rerouting demonstrated the crisis had become structurally significant for trade.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Red Sea Shipping Crisis
timeline_description: Chronology of the Red Sea shipping crisis driven by Houthi attacks, military responses, and trade rerouting.
title: Supply chains adapt but do not normalize
description: Some logistics networks adjusted to longer routes, but normal Suez traffic patterns were not restored.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Red Sea Shipping Crisis
timeline_description: Chronology of the Red Sea shipping crisis driven by Houthi attacks, military responses, and trade rerouting.
title: MSC introduces emergency fuel surcharges
description: Reuters reported new emergency surcharges as higher operating costs continued to affect cargo pricing.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Red Sea Shipping Crisis
timeline_description: Chronology of the Red Sea shipping crisis driven by Houthi attacks, military responses, and trade rerouting.
title: Red Sea remains tied to wider regional war risk
description: Escalation in the Gulf and Red Sea kept maritime security closely linked to broader Middle East conflict.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Red Sea Shipping Crisis
timeline_description: Chronology of the Red Sea shipping crisis driven by Houthi attacks, military responses, and trade rerouting.
title: Red Sea crisis reshapes trade-route strategy
description: By 2026 the crisis had become a durable case study in how regional conflict can reorder global shipping.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of OPEC and the later OPEC+ framework in global oil governance.
title: OPEC is founded in Baghdad
description: Iran, Iraq, Kuwait, Saudi Arabia, and Venezuela established OPEC at the Baghdad Conference.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of OPEC and the later OPEC+ framework in global oil governance.
title: Qatar joins OPEC
description: Qatar became the first state to join after the founders, expanding the organization's Gulf base.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of OPEC and the later OPEC+ framework in global oil governance.
title: Indonesia and Libya join
description: New members broadened OPEC's geographic and political reach.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of OPEC and the later OPEC+ framework in global oil governance.
title: OPEC moves headquarters to Vienna
description: The organization relocated from Geneva to Vienna, where its secretariat remains based.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of OPEC and the later OPEC+ framework in global oil governance.
title: Abu Dhabi joins as emirate member
description: The future UAE entered OPEC through Abu Dhabi before federation.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of OPEC and the later OPEC+ framework in global oil governance.
title: Algeria joins OPEC
description: Algeria expanded the organization's North African presence.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of OPEC and the later OPEC+ framework in global oil governance.
title: Nigeria joins OPEC
description: Nigeria's accession added a major African producer.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of OPEC and the later OPEC+ framework in global oil governance.
title: OPEC gains global political prominence during oil embargo
description: The 1973 oil shock made OPEC a central actor in world economic and diplomatic affairs.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of OPEC and the later OPEC+ framework in global oil governance.
title: OPEC summit in Algiers is attacked
description: A high-profile terrorist attack underscored the organization's political visibility in the 1970s.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of OPEC and the later OPEC+ framework in global oil governance.
title: Price collapse tests quota discipline
description: Saudi policy shifts and oversupply exposed deep problems in collective production management.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of OPEC and the later OPEC+ framework in global oil governance.
title: Ecuador withdraws
description: Ecuador became the first member to leave the organization.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of OPEC and the later OPEC+ framework in global oil governance.
title: Gabon withdraws
description: Gabon exited OPEC, reflecting the fluidity of membership in the 1990s.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of OPEC and the later OPEC+ framework in global oil governance.
title: Angola joins OPEC
description: The organization added another major African exporter.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of OPEC and the later OPEC+ framework in global oil governance.
title: OPEC and non-OPEC producers form OPEC+ cooperation
description: A wider producer coalition emerged to coordinate output more effectively, especially with Russia.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of OPEC and the later OPEC+ framework in global oil governance.
title: Equatorial Guinea joins OPEC
description: Membership growth continued even as the group evolved toward OPEC+ governance.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of OPEC and the later OPEC+ framework in global oil governance.
title: Congo joins OPEC
description: The Republic of the Congo entered as another African member.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of OPEC and the later OPEC+ framework in global oil governance.
title: Qatar leaves OPEC
description: Qatar's departure reduced the group's Gulf membership but did not affect its LNG prominence.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of OPEC and the later OPEC+ framework in global oil governance.
title: Historic OPEC+ cuts respond to pandemic crash
description: The coalition agreed to unprecedented output cuts after COVID-19 demand collapse.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of OPEC and the later OPEC+ framework in global oil governance.
title: OPEC+ extends voluntary cuts amid price management strategy
description: The producer coalition continued to use coordinated restraint to support prices.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the history of OPEC and the later OPEC+ framework in global oil governance.
title: OPEC+ remains central to supply management
description: By 2025 the broader coalition still shaped short-term expectations in world oil markets.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the military use of unmanned aerial vehicles and the evolution of drone warfare.
title: Austria uses balloon bombs against Venice
description: The attack is often cited as an early precursor to unmanned aerial attack concepts.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the military use of unmanned aerial vehicles and the evolution of drone warfare.
title: Kettering Bug is developed
description: The U.S. Army's Kettering Bug was an early pilotless aircraft project for wartime use.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the military use of unmanned aerial vehicles and the evolution of drone warfare.
title: Britain adopts target drones and popularizes the term
description: Radio-controlled aircraft used for gunnery practice helped embed the modern term drone.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the military use of unmanned aerial vehicles and the evolution of drone warfare.
title: Germany fields V-1 flying bomb
description: The V-1 became one of the earliest mass-used pilotless attack weapons.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the military use of unmanned aerial vehicles and the evolution of drone warfare.
title: Postwar remotely piloted vehicles advance
description: More sophisticated recoverable drones emerged after World War II for training and reconnaissance.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the military use of unmanned aerial vehicles and the evolution of drone warfare.
title: U-2 shootdown increases interest in unmanned reconnaissance
description: The political cost of manned reconnaissance losses encouraged investment in pilotless surveillance systems.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the military use of unmanned aerial vehicles and the evolution of drone warfare.
title: Ryan Firebee drones are used over Southeast Asia
description: The United States deployed drones for reconnaissance during the Vietnam era.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the military use of unmanned aerial vehicles and the evolution of drone warfare.
title: Yom Kippur War highlights need for unmanned systems
description: The war influenced Israeli and other militaries to invest more heavily in UAVs.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the military use of unmanned aerial vehicles and the evolution of drone warfare.
title: Israel demonstrates modern battlefield drone integration
description: Israeli use of UAVs in Lebanon showcased their value in surveillance, decoys, and targeting support.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the military use of unmanned aerial vehicles and the evolution of drone warfare.
title: Gulf War features wider UAV use
description: Coalition operations gave drones greater visibility in modern combined warfare.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the military use of unmanned aerial vehicles and the evolution of drone warfare.
title: Predator enters service-era testing
description: The MQ-1 Predator became a defining platform in the expansion of long-endurance surveillance drones.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the military use of unmanned aerial vehicles and the evolution of drone warfare.
title: Armed drone era begins in U.S. counterterrorism
description: After September 11, drones became central to surveillance and strike operations.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the military use of unmanned aerial vehicles and the evolution of drone warfare.
title: First widely reported U.S. lethal drone strike outside a conventional battlefield
description: A CIA strike in Yemen signaled the globalization of armed drone operations.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the military use of unmanned aerial vehicles and the evolution of drone warfare.
title: Drone strikes expand in Pakistan
description: U.S. strikes in Pakistan intensified political and legal debates over remote warfare.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the military use of unmanned aerial vehicles and the evolution of drone warfare.
title: Libya war shows wider allied UAV use
description: NATO and partners used drones extensively in Libya for intelligence and strike support.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the military use of unmanned aerial vehicles and the evolution of drone warfare.
title: Islamic State conflict increases drone demand
description: Drones became indispensable for targeting, surveillance, and force protection in Iraq and Syria.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the military use of unmanned aerial vehicles and the evolution of drone warfare.
title: Nagorno-Karabakh fighting highlights loitering munitions
description: Armed drones and loitering munitions showed growing battlefield impact beyond great powers.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the military use of unmanned aerial vehicles and the evolution of drone warfare.
title: Second Nagorno-Karabakh War demonstrates decisive drone effects
description: Azerbaijan's use of drones accelerated global military interest in low-cost unmanned strike systems.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the military use of unmanned aerial vehicles and the evolution of drone warfare.
title: Russia-Ukraine war normalizes mass drone warfare
description: The war made drones central at every level from artillery spotting to long-range strike.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the military use of unmanned aerial vehicles and the evolution of drone warfare.
title: Drone warfare becomes a standard feature of modern conflict
description: By the mid-2020s unmanned systems had become integral to reconnaissance, strike, and attrition warfare.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the evolution of international and U.S.-led sanctions on Iran.
title: United States freezes Iranian assets after hostage crisis
description: Washington imposed major financial measures after the seizure of the U.S. embassy in Tehran.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the evolution of international and U.S.-led sanctions on Iran.
title: Iran is designated a state sponsor of terrorism by the United States
description: The designation formed a durable basis for later sanctions architecture.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the evolution of international and U.S.-led sanctions on Iran.
title: U.S. bans most imports from Iran
description: Washington tightened trade restrictions as bilateral hostility deepened.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the evolution of international and U.S.-led sanctions on Iran.
title: Clinton bars U.S. investment in Iran's energy sector
description: Executive action sharply expanded restrictions on American commercial engagement with Iran.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the evolution of international and U.S.-led sanctions on Iran.
title: Iran and Libya Sanctions Act is enacted
description: The United States created secondary-sanctions pressure on foreign investment in Iran's energy sector.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the evolution of international and U.S.-led sanctions on Iran.
title: Nuclear revelations reframe sanctions policy
description: International attention shifted increasingly toward Iran's nuclear program and compliance questions.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the evolution of international and U.S.-led sanctions on Iran.
title: UN Security Council adopts Resolution 1737
description: The UN imposed sanctions tied to Iran's nuclear and missile activities.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the evolution of international and U.S.-led sanctions on Iran.
title: UN Resolution 1747 expands sanctions
description: The Security Council widened pressure through additional restrictions.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the evolution of international and U.S.-led sanctions on Iran.
title: UN Resolution 1803 adds further measures
description: The international sanctions regime deepened as diplomacy struggled.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the evolution of international and U.S.-led sanctions on Iran.
title: UN Resolution 1929 intensifies pressure
description: The Security Council broadened restrictions on arms, finance, and proliferation-related activity.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the evolution of international and U.S.-led sanctions on Iran.
title: United States enacts CISADA
description: Washington significantly tightened secondary sanctions and financial pressure.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the evolution of international and U.S.-led sanctions on Iran.
title: EU imposes tougher measures on Iran
description: European sanctions expanded as concerns over the nuclear program mounted.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the evolution of international and U.S.-led sanctions on Iran.
title: SWIFT disconnects sanctioned Iranian banks
description: Iran's banking isolation deepened dramatically when major banks were cut from SWIFT messaging.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the evolution of international and U.S.-led sanctions on Iran.
title: Interim nuclear accord opens path to relief
description: The Joint Plan of Action created limited sanctions easing in exchange for nuclear steps.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the evolution of international and U.S.-led sanctions on Iran.
title: JCPOA is signed
description: The nuclear deal set out phased sanctions relief in exchange for limits on Iran's nuclear program.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the evolution of international and U.S.-led sanctions on Iran.
title: Implementation Day brings broad sanctions relief
description: Major nuclear-related sanctions were suspended or lifted under the JCPOA framework.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the evolution of international and U.S.-led sanctions on Iran.
title: United States exits JCPOA
description: The Trump administration withdrew from the deal and began restoring sanctions.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the evolution of international and U.S.-led sanctions on Iran.
title: Maximum pressure sanctions are reimposed
description: Washington reinstated sweeping restrictions on Iran's oil, banking, and shipping sectors.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the evolution of international and U.S.-led sanctions on Iran.
title: U.S. sanctions architecture broadens further
description: Additional designations and enforcement actions reinforced the pressure campaign.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the evolution of international and U.S.-led sanctions on Iran.
title: OFAC issues maritime oil-evasion guidance
description: Treasury published updated guidance for shipping and maritime stakeholders on Iranian oil sanctions evasion.
